ddls:
CREATE TABLE "budget_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the budget category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the budget category */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the budget category is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_categories_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Account number */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Account name */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the account is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_line_items" (
  "line_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget line item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget category */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the budget line item */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year (e.g., 2021-22, 2022-23) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the budget line item is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the line item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the line item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_line_items_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_line_items_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_line_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES budget_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fiscal_years" (
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fiscal year */,
  "fiscal_year_name" TEXT /* Name of the fiscal year (e.g., 2021-22, 2022-23) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal year */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the fiscal year is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fiscal year was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fiscal year was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fiscal_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_amounts" (
  "amount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget amount */,
  "line_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget line item */,
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fiscal year */,
  "amount_type" TEXT /* Type of budget amount (e.g., Actual, Revised, Proposed) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Budget amount */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the budget amount is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the budget amount was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the budget amount was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_amounts_line_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_item_id") REFERENCES budget_line_items ("line_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_amounts_amount_type FOREIGN KEY ("amount_type") REFERENCES amount_types ("amount_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_amounts_fiscal_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_year_id") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("fiscal_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amount_types" (
  "amount_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amount type */,
  "amount_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the amount type (e.g., Actual, Revised, Proposed) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the amount type is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the amount type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the amount type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amount_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, department head) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed and salted password of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the department is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "department_heads" (
  "head_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department head */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the department head is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department head was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department head was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("head_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_heads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_heads_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  "last_generated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last generation of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access event is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES budget_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the audit trail is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit trail was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit trail was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES budget_amounts ("amount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES budget_line_items ("line_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
